project_statement: LandSeaLot has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe Framework Programme for Research and Innovation under grant agreement No 101134575. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or European Research Executive Agency. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them. UK participantsin Horizon Europe Project LandSeaLot are supportedby UKRI grant numbers: 10109592 University of Stirling and 10107554 Plymouth Marine Laboratory.
